summary: Maeda has pivoted from a profitable shorting campaign to calling the crypto market bottom and predicting higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After aggressively shorting Ethereum through late 2025 and early 2026, his latest video explicitly declares 'The Bottom Is In' and outlines a thesis for Bitcoin moving higher. He argues that the market has washed out leverage and now presents an opportunity for upside, marking a complete reversal from his previous bearish positioning.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
